team.name: Bumstronaut
team.description: Lead Bark developer, Created the game, has made many different projects, and is a lowkey chill dude!

team.name: Army VR
team.description: Part of the original 3 creators of bark, made the player model and a lot more!

team.name: LemonF1
team.description: One of the 3 original developers of bark, made the map and a lot more!

games.name: BARK
games.tagline: ONE BIG MAP, ONE SMALL COMMUNITY
games.shortDesc: One big map, one small community. Enter Bark — a world of the Trelatves. Hang out with others, play at the arcade, and enjoy the world of Bark!
games.fullDesc: Enter Bark, a world of the Trelatves. In Bark, you hang out with others, play at the new arcade, and enjoy the world of Bark!

reviews.author: StarProgramPillow
reviews.text: Really good game! Can't wait for the rat DLC!

reviews.author: llamaboi1
reviews.text: This game is so amazing 👍 if you don't like this, you're a stinky head

games.name: Glorp!
games.shortDesc: In this game, you play as a rat. you can travel through sewers, jam out to music, and most importantly, have fun!
games.fullDesc: In this game, you play as a rat. there are currently 6 maps! we have a plethora of different cosmetics. its pretty much your common vr game!

reviews.author: King_chickennugget
reviews.text: I bought a house owners really nice I’m going to sleep in my new house

reviews.author: SUSchunks
reviews.text: This game is delicious anyone who finds this game should get it Pls do it’s a very yummy game! 🤤😋

reviews.author: Bumstronaut
reviews.text: This game is actually a w, So good am I right

games.name: Parakeet Park
games.shortDesc: Snow has fallen down in Parakeet Park! Hop on down and chill out with your friends! Vibe to the music, Dance with the parakeets around the town that grows almost every update! Stay warm out there!
games.fullDesc: Snow has fallen down in Parakeet Park! Hop on down and chill out with up to 19 your friends! Vibe to the holiday music, Go ice skating in the middle of the town, Dance with the parakeets around the town that grows almost every update! The world is ever changing, and you'll be able to meet new NPCs throughout the town! Stay warm out there, for it is chilly!

games.name: The Testevator
games.shortDesc: Explore rooms using a magic elevator, Find hidden easter eggs, Get weirdly confused by dancing frogs, And have fun!
games.fullDesc: Explore rooms using a magic elevator, Find hidden easter eggs, Get weirdly confused by dancing frogs,  Customize your body,  Laugh at strange things, And have fun!

siteText.extrasForecastDisclaimer: Forecast uses the same algorithm as the in-game system. No manual overrides are shown on this page.

items.name: Duck
items.effect: He quacks if you click your trigger while holding him!

items.name: Bark Boy
items.description: "Come on mom, just one more game?"
items.effect: Let's you spy on the Electric Arcade

items.name: Baseball Bat
items.effect: Let's you fling other players.

items.name: Toy Hammer
items.effect: Flings other players with extra power

items.name: Bamboo Bat
items.effect: flings other players

items.name: BARKet
items.effect: Looks Cool (Maybe Future Purpose)

items.name: bean trophie'
items.description: Obtained during the 2026 Bark To Beans update
items.effect: Looks cool

items.name: Bean Gun
items.effect: Shoots Tons of Beans, Good Flying Method!

items.name: Blurryface
items.description: "My name's Blurryface and i care what you think"
items.effect: Grants access to Songs Stressed out and Message Man by Twenty One Pilots

items.name: Breach
items.description: "Move it up, move it up, it's a breach"
items.effect: Grants access to Songs City Walls, and The Contract by Twenty One Pilots

items.name: Rat World OST.1
items.effect: Grants access to songs Eternity, Coin Snatcher, S*icide, and Fancy Rats

items.name: Chicken Nugget
items.effect: it's just there, probably eatable in the future

items.name: Clancy
items.description: "Can't change what you've done. Start fresh next semester"
items.effect: Grants access to Songs Next Semester, and Paladin Strait by Twenty One Pilots

items.name: Controller
items.description: Comes with the Basement Boss Bundle
items.effect: If you click your trigger while holding the controller, it plays 8 bit game noises

items.name: Cow
items.description: Bumstronaut's favorite item, the sounds it makes is just Bumstronaut going "moo"
items.effect: Besides being an absolute adorable creature, it moos when you click your trigger while holding it.

items.name: Easter Trophy Variant
items.description: Could get this trophy during the 2025 easter update
items.effect: show's how og you are

items.name: Forgotten Potential Entertainment
items.effect: Grant's access to songs Time To Say Goodbye, and Drag Path (Breach Digital Remains) by Twenty One Pilots

items.name: Greg
items.effect: Chills, helps you cheat in blinko

items.name: Hudson's Bird
items.description: Based off a drawing from a kid that goes to Bumstronaut's school
items.effect: Stares into your soul.

items.name: Kevin
items.description: Suggested by JJTERRYVR, he a borb.
items.effect: Is very fun to use as a bowling ball or chuck into tornados

items.name: Leaf Blade
items.description: Obtained with the Jungle Ninja Bundle
items.effect: Cut's vines, when you slice with it, it LEAVES behind leaf particles (pun indented)

items.name: Flying Cube
items.description: Only members of the Cube Crew have access to this item. Fun Fact: It was originally going to move your arms down and make them legs
items.effect: Let's you fly around, hard to master

items.name: Mod Text
items.effect: Show's proof of being a mod

items.name: No Phun Intended
items.effect: Grants access to songs Hole In The Ground, and Taco Bell Saga by Tyler Joseph (Twenty One Pilots lead singer)

items.name: Paint
items.effect: Does nothing, hopefully future feature

items.name: Puke
items.description: Puke is the best, CW: PukeWorld in yeeps
items.effect: Makes noises when you right click while holding him

items.name: Regional At Best
items.description: "your an angel fallen down, won't you tell us of the clouds."
items.effect: Grants access to songs Ruby, Two, and Lovely (remastered) by Twenty One Pilots

items.name: Scaled And Icy
items.description: "I know it's over, I was born a choker"
items.effect: Grants access to songs Choker, and Formidable by Twenty One Pilots

items.name: Shroom
items.effect: Shrinks you when you click your trigger while holding it

items.name: Trench
items.description: "Don't get me wrong the rise in awareness is beating a stigma that no longer scares us."
items.effect: Grants access to songs Neon Gravestones, and Nico and the Niners by Twenty One Pilots

items.name: Twenty One Pilots (Self-Titled)
items.description: "I won't fall in love with falling."
items.effect: Grants access to songs Air Catcher, and Trapdoor by Twenty One Pilots

items.name: Vessel
items.description: "I know where you stand. Silent in the trees."
items.effect: Grants songs Ode To Sleep, and Trees by Twenty One Pilots

items.name: Walkie Talkie
items.effect: Nothing as of now, future plans

items.name: Water Gun
items.effect: Nothing yet, has future plans

items.name: Flash on my light till i illuminate an area
items.description: LemonF1 named it that, take it up with him...
items.effect: Turns on the light when you click your trigger while holding it

items.name: Domino
items.effect: Does domino effect

items.name: Duck Sergeant
items.effect: Pulls out some crazy guns and quacks when you click your trigger

items.name: Bowling Pin
items.effect: Bowling Pin Stuff

items.name: Bowling Ball
items.effect: Bowling Ball Stuff

items.name: Wooden Rectangle
items.effect: Can be used for very buggy Jenga

items.name: Bark Chip
items.description: 17 Different chips, very tasty. Get them in the chip machine at the Electric Arcade
items.effect: Changes your woodtype for a session, you eat them, they're tasty.

maps.name: Town Square
maps.description: All the shops are here! Buy items, and have fun!

maps.name: Treehouse
maps.description: Has a very long ladder to the top, which has both the name Badge machine, and the Paper Coin machine!

maps.name: Electric Arcade
maps.description: Gamble, buy fun prizes, and eat chips and this local hangout spot owned by Sparks!

maps.name: Homebase Station
maps.description: This is where you arrive in the map! has info boards and the LIV camera!

maps.name: Rundown Playground
maps.description: A slide and a trampoline, that's all :b

maps.name: OG Map
maps.description: This is where it all begun,

maps.name: Knawcheese Hideout
maps.description: Rat's and Geese gather here monthly to each cheese

npcs.name: Phil
npcs.description: A tan cube that flops around, swaps cosmetics, and somehow controls the trelative's gravity?

npcs.name: Trader John
npcs.description: Works at the Event Shop, finds a lot of cool items. He has the OGOG woodtype.

npcs.name: Buggs
npcs.description: Runs the Holdables Shop. Palm woodtype.

npcs.name: Aero
npcs.description: Runs the Hat shop, oldest trelative in the town. Rock woodtype.

npcs.name: Creaks
npcs.description: Owns the shirt shop, close friends with Twigs. Mangrove woodtype.

npcs.name: Marco
npcs.description: Displays information at the info booth. Still waiting for a response from Polo. Has a weird relationship with the sun??? Plank woodtype.

npcs.name: Twigs
npcs.description: Owns the face shop, close fiends with Creaks. Dark Oak woodtype.

npcs.name: Beaker
npcs.description: Owns the extra shop, kind of an introvert. Birch woodtype.

npcs.name: Pablo The Stick
npcs.description: He just lays there, kinda exists

npcs.name: Fiesta Tree
npcs.description: Also just relaxes, wonder what's going on in his head,

npcs.name: Sparks
npcs.description: Runs the Electric Arcade, he was truck by lighting when he was just a wee little twig, and it's infused into his dna!
